EmailTemplate.name: AN - Candidate rejection email
EmailTemplate.subject: Update on your application with Alliance Nursing
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for taking the time to apply with us. We regret to inform you that we won’t be moving forward with your application at this time.
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
